title: Custom Texture Fix
description: Fix old custom resource packs with a "custom" texture folder for 1.19.3 and above.
body:
Fix old (before 1.19.3) custom resource packs with a "custom" texture folder.

Thanks to [https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-259931?focusedId=1237160&page=com.atlassian.jira.plugin.system.issuetabpanels%3Acomment-tabpanel#comment-1237160](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-259931?focusedId=1237160&page=com.atlassian.jira.plugin.system.issuetabpanels%3Acomment-tabpanel#comment-1237160) for the solution.

This resource pack will not be updated and should work on higher versions of the game.
